parameters.subject: Thanks for your interest in SaaS Lead Intelligence!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for your interest. Check out our free community edition to get started right away. If your needs change, feel free to reply.

Best,
The Team

parameters.subject: Thanks for your interest in SaaS Lead Intelligence!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for your interest. We help many companies in {{ $json.industry }} optimize their lead generation. Let's schedule a call to discuss how our platform can fit your specific needs.

Best,
The Team

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID,
  text: "🔥 *Hot Lead Alert* — Score: " + ($json.intent_score ?? $json.final_score ?? "") + "

*Name:* " + ($json.name ?? "") + "
*Email:* " + ($json.email ?? "") + "
*Company:* " + ($json.company_name || "Unknown") + "
*Employees:* " + ($json.employee_count || "—") + "
*Industry:* " + ($json.industry || "—") + "
*Revenue:* " + ($json.estimated_revenue || "—") + "

*AI Reasoning:* " + ($json.reasoning_summary || ""),
  parse_mode: "Markdown"
}) }}

string.name: reasoning_summary
string.value: Freemium email provider; skipped enrichment and routed to self-serve follow-up.

string.name: intent_reasoning
string.value: Freemium email provider; skipped enrichment and routed to self-serve follow-up.
